title: propertyPoint operation
description: Single-point property evaluation: pick a (T, P, composition) and the thermo package reports every property the chosen models can compute (Psat, gamma_i, K_i, Cp_ig, H_ig, S_ig, Z, v, H_real, S_real,...).  No CSV output -- results print to the run log; open the Log tab in the output panel to read them.  Useful for JANAF/SRK/PR audit points and as a quick property check.

state.title: Thermodynamic state
state.description: The (T, P, composition) at which the property is evaluated.
